'''chazhupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:igui|igui]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:igui|igui]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chazhupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzhipith|chæzhipith]] || [[word:chæzhipij|chæzhipij]] || [[word:chæzhipish|chæzhipish]] || [[word:chæzhipi|chæzhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazhuzhuputh|chazhuzhuputh]] || [[word:chazhuzhupuj|chazhuzhupuj]] || [[word:chazhuzhupush|chazhuzhupush]] || [[word:chazhuzhupu|chazhuzhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazhuputh|chazhuputh]] || [[word:chazhupuj|chazhupuj]] || [[word:chazhupush|chazhupush]] || [[word:chazhupu|chazhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazhufputh|chazhufputh]] || [[word:chazhufpuj|chazhufpuj]] || [[word:chazhufpush|chazhufpush]] || [[word:chazhufpuf|chazhufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazhuputhu|chazhuputhu]] || [[word:chazhupuju|chazhupuju]] || [[word:chazhupushu|chazhupushu]] || [[word:chazhupuku|chazhupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazhuputh|chazhuputh]] || [[word:chazhupuj|chazhupuj]] || [[word:chazhupush|chazhupush]] || [[word:chazhupu|chazhupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazhuputhul|chazhuputhul]] || [[word:chazhupujul|chazhupujul]] || [[word:chazhupushul|chazhupushul]] || [[word:chazhupukul|chazhupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazhuputhuthu|chazhuputhuthu]] || [[word:chazhupujuju|chazhupujuju]] || [[word:chazhupushushu|chazhupushushu]] || [[word:chazhupuku|chazhupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazhuputhun|chazhuputhun]] || [[word:chazhupujun|chazhupujun]] || [[word:chazhupushun|chazhupushun]] || [[word:chazhupukun|chazhupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazhuputhuoro|chazhuputhuoro]] || [[word:chazhupujuoro|chazhupujuoro]] || [[word:chazhupushuoro|chazhupushuoro]] || [[word:chazhupukuoro|chazhupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
